info.title: Straddle API
info.description: Straddle is a payments processing platform that enables businesses to accept fast, secure payments via Pay by Bank. Manage accounts, customers, payments, payouts, and linked bank accounts.

post.description: Creates a new account with business and contact details.

get.description: Returns accounts sorted by creation date with filtering and sorting options.
Retrieve an account by its ID.

patch.description: Modify account details during or after onboarding.

post.description: Initiates onboarding for an account. Requires a representative and a linked bank account.
Sandbox-only endpoint for testing onboarding transitions.
Associate an external bank account with a Straddle account.

get.description: Returns linked bank accounts sorted by creation date with pagination support.
Retrieve linked bank account details (masked).

patch.description: Modify linked bank accounts in 'created' or 'onboarding' status.

delete.description: Cancel linked bank accounts in 'created' status only.

get.description: Retrieve unmasked sensitive details of a linked bank account.

post.description: Collect a payment from a customer.

get.description: Retrieve a charge by its ID.

patch.description: Modify charge amount, date, or details.

delete.description: Prevent processing of a charge (created/hold status only).

post.description: Prevent processing of a charge (created status only).
Allow processing of a held charge.
Send money to a customer.

get.description: Retrieve a payout by its ID.

patch.description: Modify payout amount, date, or details.

delete.description: Prevent sending of a payout (created/hold status only).

post.description: Prevent processing of a payout.
Allow processing of a held payout.
Verify and onboard a new customer.

get.description: Search customers with filters and query parameters.
Retrieve a customer by their ID.

post.description: Review identity and risk scores for a customer.

patch.description: Update a reviewed customer's status to verified or rejected.

get.description: Retrieve unmasked PII for a customer.

post.description: Create an account representative.

get.description: Returns representatives sorted by creation date with filtering options.
Retrieve representative details.

patch.description: Modify personal details and contact info.

get.description: Retrieve unmasked PII for a representative.

post.description: Create paykeys from raw bank account details.
Create paykeys from Plaid tokens.
Create paykeys from Quiltt tokens.
Generate a Bridge widget session token.

get.description: Retrieve a paykey by its ID.
Filter and query paykeys.
Retrieve a paykey with unmasked token.
Retrieve review details for a paykey.

patch.description: Update review status for a paykey.

post.description: Set paykey status to inactive.
Unblock a paykey after an R29 return code.

get.description: Retrieve unmasked bank account data for a paykey.

post.description: Submit a capability enablement request.

get.description: Returns sorted capability requests with filtering options.
Search funding events with filters and query parameters.
Get line item details per payment for a funding event.

post.description: Sandbox-only testing endpoint for funding events.
Create a new organization.

get.description: Returns sorted organizations with filtering and sorting options.
Query all payments in the system.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key
